case_title: H. KENNETH AHN VS. JURI KIM et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,237.50 FILED BY AHN, H. KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, JURI KIM, JONG HA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF AHN, H. KENNETH
SC-108 ANSWER- REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT KIM, JURI KIM, JONG HA
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR TRIAL. PER COURT ORDER. HEARING SET FOR OCT-29-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 20.00 - SERVED JUN-30-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, JURI
NOTICE OF STAY OF PROCEEDINGS. FILED BY DEFENDANT KIM, JURI KIM, JONG HA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $20.00 - SERVED APR-30-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, JONG HA
ORDER ON SC-108. THE REQUEST TO CANCEL THE DISMISSAL IS GRANTED. OTHER ORDERS: THE MATTER IS STAYED AND CONTINUED FOR TRIAL ON OCT-29-2014.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF AHN, H. KENNETH
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-14-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT JURI KIM WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JONG HA KIM, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
